<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay; use Spatie\Ray\Ray; class RayProxy { /** @var array */ protected $methodsCalled = []; public function __call($method, $arguments) { $this->methodsCalled[] = compact('method', 'arguments'); } public function applyCalledMethods(Ray $ray) { foreach ($this->methodsCalled as $methodCalled) { call_user_func_array([$ray, $methodCalled['method']], $methodCalled['arguments']); } } }
